response.justification: Maria brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) and recent hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP tooling, which directly matches a rare requirement. Her testing culture (TDD, test-runner authorship, workshops) and architecture experience across scales are strong. Gaps are Nest.js and Kotlin, which are learnable given her demonstrated polyglot range, though neither is evidenced on the resume.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience with MongoDB, AWS, and Kubernetes
Direct AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Strong testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, teaches workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin absent and Java experience is dated (robotics work, 2016-2018)
Significant career time in DLang/niche ecosystems rather than the JD's mainstream stack
